HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT HUEI-PING LIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. HUEI-PING LIN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq., counsel for plaintiff Northpoint Apartments

Huei-Ping Lin, defendant
Allison B. Moser, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2310 Powell Street, #310, City and County of San Francisco, State of California.

Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
